# ConverseAI

> ConverseAI builds custom AI agents — voice, WhatsApp, and agentic workflows — and runs them in production for mid-market and SMB teams. We scope the problem, build the agent, and manage it ongoing. No AI team required on your end.

Founded 2021 · A product of Revti Digital · Headquarters: Jaipur, India · Serving India and United States

## What We Do

ConverseAI delivers AI agents as a managed service. We don't sell software licences or hand over a codebase — we build the agent, deploy it, and keep it running. Every engagement is fixed-fee and fixed-timeline; the client owns the outcome and the IP.

**Delivery model:** Scope → Build → Deploy → Managed run & maintain (ongoing retainer).

**Track record:** 100+ AI systems built and running · 50+ businesses served · 500+ integrations · Meta Tech Provider Partner

## Services

- [AI Strategy & Readiness Audit](https://theconverseai.com/services/ai-strategy-audit): 3-week fixed-fee engagement. Identify 5–10 high-ROI AI use cases and receive a 90-day prioritised roadmap.
- [Agentic Process Automation](https://theconverseai.com/services/agentic-automation): Replace brittle RPA with AI agents that reason across your SaaS stack. First production agent live in 30 days.
- [AI Voice Agents](https://theconverseai.com/services/ai-voice-agents): Human-sounding inbound and outbound voice AI. 24/7, multilingual (English, Hindi, regional Indian languages, Spanish).
- [Custom AI Agent Development](https://theconverseai.com/services/custom-ai-agents): Bespoke AI agents for SDR, support, finance, and research workflows. Production in 4–8 weeks. Client owns the IP.
- [AI Integration Services](https://theconverseai.com/services/ai-integration): Connect AI to Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, SAP, Zendesk, and internal tools. No rip-and-replace.
- [Document & Knowledge Intelligence](https://theconverseai.com/services/knowledge-intelligence): Private, citation-backed enterprise RAG over your documents. Deployed in your cloud. Zero hallucination tolerance.
- [Sales Intelligence & Outreach](https://theconverseai.com/services/sales-ai): Signal-triggered B2B outbound — research, personalised email + LinkedIn + voice, reply handling.
- [AI for SMBs](https://theconverseai.com/solutions/ai-for-smb): All of the above, scoped and priced for small and mid-sized businesses.

## Product Platform

ConverseAI also operates a conversational AI SaaS platform for customer engagement:

- [AI Chatbot](https://theconverseai.com/chatbot): Website AI chatbot for customer support automation
- [Live Chat](https://theconverseai.com/live-chat): Real-time human + AI-assisted live chat
- [WhatsApp AI Chatbot](https://theconverseai.com/whatsapp-ai-chatbot): AI-powered WhatsApp automation
- [WhatsApp Shop](https://theconverseai.com/whatsapp-shop): Sell products directly via WhatsApp
- [WhatsApp Marketing](https://theconverseai.com/whatsapp-marketing): Broadcasts, drip campaigns, and cart recovery on WhatsApp
- [Omni-Channel Inbox](https://theconverseai.com/omni-channel): Unified inbox across all messaging channels
- [Analytics & Reports](https://theconverseai.com/agent-reports): Agent, team, CSAT, and inbox performance reports

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://theconverseai.com/): Platform and services overview

- [Blog](https://blog.theconverseai.com): Articles on agentic AI, WhatsApp automation, and AI for mid-market
- [Book a Discovery Call](https://theconverseai.com/book-demo): Free 30-minute AI Opportunity Audit call

## Positioning

ConverseAI sits in a distinct category from:
- **AI platforms** (Sierra, Decagon, Vapi, Wati) — those sell software; you build and run it yourself
- **Dev agencies** — those build and hand over a codebase; you operate it
- **ConverseAI** — we build the agent *and* run it in production. Managed, outcome-first, ongoing.

Our cost structure combines India-based delivery economics with US-grade engineering, making enterprise-quality agentic AI accessible to mid-market teams without an internal AI bench.

## Compliance & Trust

- GDPR-compliant by default
- CCPA-aligned
- DPDP (India) compliant
- Data remains in client's cloud environment where required
- Meta Tech Provider Partner (verified)
- No model training on client data
